en.name: Nonogram
en.description: Nonogram (also known as Picross or Griddlers) is a picture logic puzzle that combines deduction with creativity! Use the number clues along the rows and columns to determine which cells to fill. When solved correctly, a hidden pixel art picture emerges. This satisfying blend of logic and art has made Nonogram a beloved puzzle genre worldwide, offering both relaxation and mental challenge.
en.objectives: Fill in the correct cells based on the number clues to reveal a hidden pixel art image. Use logical deduction—each number represents a consecutive group of filled cells in that row or column.
en.howToPlay: Numbers indicate consecutive filled cells in that row/column. Multiple numbers mean separate groups with at least one empty cell between them. Click to fill or X to mark empty cells.

rules.controls: Left-click to fill a cell, right-click (or shift+click) to mark it as empty with an X. Click and drag to fill or mark multiple cells.
mechanics: Numbers on the left indicate filled cell groups for each row
Numbers on top indicate filled cell groups for each column
Groups must appear in the order shown (left-to-right, top-to-bottom)
At least one empty cell separates groups
Complete all rows and columns to reveal the picture
features: Hint System - Get help when stuck
Picture Gallery - View completed pixel art

tips: Start with the largest numbers that nearly fill a row/column
Look for rows/columns where only one arrangement is possible
Mark definitely empty cells with X to help visualize

faq.question: How do I read the number clues?
faq.answer: Each number tells you the size of a consecutive group of filled cells. '3 2' means a group of 3, at least one empty cell, then a group of 2. They appear in that order.

faq.question: What's the best starting strategy?
faq.answer: Look for rows or columns with large numbers. If a '10' appears in a 15-cell row, the middle 5 cells must be filled regardless of position.

faq.question: What if I make a mistake?
faq.answer: Use the undo feature or click a filled cell again to clear it. The auto-check feature can highlight errors.

faq.question: Are puzzles always solvable with logic?
faq.answer: Yes! Well-designed Nonograms can be solved purely through logical deduction without guessing. Look for rows/columns where clues force specific cells.

zh.name: 数织
zh.desc: 揭示隐藏的像素艺术图片
zh.description: 数织（又称像素填色或逻辑拼图）是一款结合推理与创意的图片逻辑谜题！利用行列旁边的数字线索来确定哪些格子需要填充。当正确解答时，一幅隐藏的像素艺术图片会显现出来。这种逻辑与艺术的完美结合使数织成为全球深受喜爱的谜题类型，同时提供放松和精神挑战。
zh.objectives: 根据数字线索填充正确的格子以揭示隐藏的像素艺术图像。使用逻辑推理——每个数字代表该行或列中连续的填充格子组。
zh.howToPlay: 数字表示该行/列中连续填充的单元格。多个数字表示分开的组，组之间至少有一个空单元格。点击填充，X标记空单元格。

rules.controls: 左键点击填充格子，右键点击（或shift+点击）用X标记为空。点击并拖动可填充或标记多个格子。
mechanics: 左侧数字表示每行的填充格子组
顶部数字表示每列的填充格子组
组必须按显示顺序出现（从左到右，从上到下）
组之间至少有一个空格
完成所有行和列以揭示图片
features: 多种尺寸 - 从5×5到20×20网格
提示系统 - 卡住时获取帮助
自动检查 - 验证你的进度
图片画廊 - 查看完成的像素艺术

tips: 从几乎填满一行/列的最大数字开始
寻找只有一种排列可能的行/列
用X标记确定空的单元格以帮助可视化
在行和列之间交叉参考

faq.question: 如何解读数字线索？
faq.answer: 每个数字告诉你连续填充格子组的大小。'3 2'表示一组3个，至少一个空格，然后一组2个。它们按此顺序出现。

faq.question: 最佳开始策略是什么？
faq.answer: 寻找有大数字的行或列。如果15格行中出现'10'，无论位置如何，中间5格必须填充。

faq.question: 如果我犯错了怎么办？
faq.answer: 使用撤销功能或再次点击已填充的格子清除它。自动检查功能可以高亮错误。

faq.question: 谜题是否总能用逻辑解决？
faq.answer: 是的！设计良好的数织可以完全通过逻辑推理解决，无需猜测。寻找线索强制特定格子的行/列。
